author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: authz_authentication_details_exposes_all_users
summary: Registers a fresh low-privilege user, GETs /rest/user/authentication-details (and similar paths), and flags the endpoint when it returns the full user directory with auth-flavoured fields (deluxeToken, totpSecret, lastLoginIp, role) to a non-admin caller.
